title: Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board
summary: List official alert level, wind direction, smoke visibility, road status, vulnerable people, animals, vehicle availability, and the latest safe departure time.
content: List official alert level, wind direction, smoke visibility, road status, vulnerable people, animals, vehicle availability, and the latest safe departure time. Leave early when authorities instruct evacuation or when the planned route may soon become unsafe. Do not wait for flames to become visible before acting on verified evacuation instructions.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board»
steps: List official alert level, wind direction, smoke visibility, road status, vulnerable people, animals, vehicle availability, and the latest safe departure time.
Leave early when authorities instruct evacuation or when the planned route may soon become unsafe.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board.
warnings: Do not wait for flames to become visible before acting on verified evacuation instructions.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board.
short_term: For Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Wildfire pre-evacuation trigger board to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
